TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Uruguay, title = Uruguay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uruguay} }

S.FORM: Uruguay hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 S, 56 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 176,215 sq km (maki' tay 91ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 175,015 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,200 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 3,351,016. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga87.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 10.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Montevideo. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tabar√© V√°zquez, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Uruguay hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 S, 56 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 176,215 sq km (maki' tay 91ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 175,015 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,200 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 3,351,016. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga87.20% , lhlahuy hya' ga 10.20%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 2.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Montevideo. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 25 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tabar√© V√°zquez, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: uru…£uaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** w na nan-me ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a monte*i*eo. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a taő≤ar* **zquez, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
